final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original WeChat Official Account article cover for the "染秋" fragrance product launch, in a premium editorial aesthetic with centered composition and the title prominently featured.

Style/medium: premium editorial cover design with the quiet confidence of a luxury fragrance launch, matte paper sophistication
Composition: centered composition with generous breathing room, the title as the gravitational center of the frame
Subject: the Chinese title "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香" as the visual anchor, with subtle fragrance product or autumn botanical elements as supporting presence
Scene/backdrop: restrained autumn atmosphere with soft negative space allowing the title to breathe
Lighting/mood: the warm honey light of late afternoon in autumn, a quiet reverence for the season's passing
Color palette: warm amber and honeyed earth tones, muted gold accents, the temperature of autumn leaves at golden hour
Materials/textures: matte paper grain with the subtle texture of dried autumn leaves, soft shadows that suggest depth without weight
Text (verbatim): 染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香
Constraints: title must be the dominant visual element, centered placement, premium luxury tonality, 900x500 aspect ratio
Avoid: cluttered composition, bright saturated colors, busy patterns competing with the title, generic stock autumn imagery
